programme.title: Live EFL
programme.desc: Coventry City v Preston North End (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the Championship match at Coventry Building Society Arena. The sides shared the spoils in a 1-1 draw in December's reverse fixture despite Liam Lindsay's 39th-minute red card for Preston when the score was still 0-0. However, title-chasing Coventry will expect to take all three points this time around in front of their own fans.
